global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.visual_style: bright and modern with playful elements
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream with a free trial and highlighting the subscription price.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonCast' appears in a bold, modern font at the top, set against the purple background.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype' is prominently displayed in a large, eye-catching font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Subtext for promotion
elements.description: The phrase 'Start free today' is shown below the main text in a slightly smaller font, maintaining visibility.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Start now' is positioned below the promotional text, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Subscription price
elements.description: The price '$4.99' is displayed in a bold font, drawing attention to the cost of the service.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Several circular shapes are scattered across the background, adding a playful and dynamic element to the design.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape is positioned in the center, providing a backdrop for the text elements.

elements.label: Additional circular shapes
elements.description: More circular shapes are present, complementing the overall design and enhancing visual interest.

elements.label: Additional rectangular shape
elements.description: Another rectangular shape is included, contributing to the layered look of the ad.

elements.label: Lower corner element
elements.description: A small element in the lower corner that is not clearly defined in the context of the ad.

elements.label: Side element
elements.description: A small element on the side that does not contribute significantly to the overall message.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype Start free today $4.99 Start now' is a combined promotional message at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype Start free today $4.99 Start now

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonCast' is displayed prominently at the top, representing the brand.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern with playful elements, promotional text and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main promotional text and subtext, with the call to action button and price at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype, Start free today, $4.99, Start now, NeonCast
